name: Deployment Authorization
description: Decides WHETHER a deploy to a given target env (dev|preview|prod) may run RIGHT NOW from live SDLC STATE — not from a founder signature. Reads the SDLC signals for the target (verification done, approvals present, founder-review-if-applicable) and returns a per-signal verdict {authorized, target, reason, signals{...}} with exit 0 iff authorized. It is the AUTHORIZATION half of the deploy lane: the deployment-operator's deploy-lane.mjs wrapper calls it before every action and never deploys past an unfinished governance step (fail-closed). Read-only and idempotent — it judges state, it never changes it.

output.verdict: JSON {authorized, target, reason, signals{...}} on stdout (the per-signal SDLC-state verdict)

observability.outcome: the {authorized, target, reason, signals} verdict — each signal (verification / approvals / founder-review-if-applicable) reported with its own pass/fail so a refusal names the exact unfinished governance step the deploy must not pass
